title: siem-settings
description: Contains Security Information Event Management (SIEM) integration settings.

enableForAllPolicies.description: Whether you enabled SIEM for all the security policies in the configuration version.

enableSiem.description: Whether you enabled SIEM in a security configuration version.

enabledBotmanSiemEvents.description: __Deprecated__ Whether you enabled SIEM for the Bot Manager events. Use `exceptions` parameter instead to set botman siem events exception.

exceptions.description: Describes all attack type exceptions that will be ignored in SIEM events.

actionTypes.description: Describes [actions](https://techdocs.akamai.com/application-security/reference/siem-action-and-attack-type-exceptions) to be excluded for a particular attack type. A `*` value means all actions.

protection.description: [Attack types](https://techdocs.akamai.com/application-security/reference/siem-action-and-attack-type-exceptions) to be added as an exception.

firewallPolicyIds.description: The list of security policy identifiers for which to enable the SIEM integration.

includeJA4FingerprintToSiem.description: Whether you enabled JA4 header forwarding for SIEM.
